nasb.text: So the Lord scattered them abroad from there over the face of the whole earth; and they stopped building the city.

esv.text: So the Lord dispersed them from there over the face of all the earth, and they left off building the city.

cnv.text: 於是，耶和華把他們從那裡分散到全地上，他們就停止建造那城。

ccb.text: 于是，耶和华把他们从那里分散到世界各地，他们便不再建造那城了。

csbs.text: 于是耶和华把他们从那里分散到整个地面上，他们就停止建造那城。
